name: Make Ahead Mashed Potatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Boil peeled potatoes until tender.
2. Beat sour cream and cream cheese together.
3. Add hot potatoes to the mixture and beat until smooth.
4. Stir in butter, chives, salt, and pepper to taste.
5. Transfer the mixture to a greased two-quart casserole dish.
6. Dot with additional butter and sprinkle paprika on top.
7. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 25 minutes.
- NOTE: This recipe can be made ahead of time and refrigerated in a crock-pot. On the serving day, turn on the crock-pot to low heat and cook the potatoes for about 2-3 hours until ready with the rest of the dinner.
